title: 10 best herbal capsules for urinary calculus
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for urinary calculus are natural supplements designed to support the kidneys and bladder in eliminating kidney stones. These capsules typically contain a blend of herbs such as chanca piedra, hydrangea root, and juniper berries that help to break down and eliminate stone-forming substances in the urine, reducing the risk of recurring attacks. For example, Chanca Piedra herbal capsules have been shown to significantly reduce pain and discomfort associated with passing kidney stones, improving quality of life for individuals who suffer from this common condition.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bearberry capsules helps with urinary calculus because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce inflammation in the kidneys and bladder, allowing for smoother passage of stones. The herb's ability to acidify urine also helps prevent further stone formation by creating an environment less conducive to stone growth. Additionally, bearberry's diuretic effects increase urine production, flushing out smaller stones or breaking down larger ones into smaller fragments that can be easily excreted, providing relief from painful symptoms and promoting overall urinary health.
remedy_properties: Aromatic glycosides: Bearberry capsules contain aromatic glycosides, such as arbutin and methylarbutin, which have antibacterial and antifungal properties that help combat infections and reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, thereby preventing the formation of kidney stones.

Tannins: Tannins in bearberry capsules have astringent properties that can help to shrink the size of existing kidney stones by binding to the stone's surface and reducing its surface area, making it easier to pass through the urinary tract.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in bearberry capsules have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the kidneys, which can contribute to the formation of kidney stones.
remedy_parts: Roots: Bearberry roots contain arbutin, a compound that helps dissolve kidney stones and prevent their formation.
Barks: Bearberry barks have anti-inflammatory properties that aid in reducing inflammation and pain associated with urinary tract infections and kidney stones.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200 grams of fresh arctostaphylos uva ursi leaves and stems from a trusted source.
Dry the harvested material in a warm, dry place for at least 24 hours to reduce moisture content.
Grind 150 grams of dried arctostaphylos uva ursi into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered herb with 50 grams of gelatin capsules in a small bowl, filling each capsule to approximately 250 milligrams capacity.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate for longer storage periods.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Silver birch capsules helps with urinary calculus because they contain a compound called betulin, which has been shown to inhibit the formation of calcium oxalate crystals that can lead to kidney stones. Additionally, the antioxidants and flavonoids present in silver birch may help reduce inflammation and improve urine flow, making it easier for small stones to pass through the urinary tract without causing discomfort or complications. By promoting a healthy urinary environment, silver birch capsules may help prevent the formation of new stones and alleviate symptoms associated with existing ones.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in Silver Birch capsules have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the kidneys and urinary tract, thereby preventing or relieving symptoms of urinary calculi.

Triterpenes: Triterpenes found in Silver Birch capsules possess analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with kidney stones, as well as reduce inflammation and swelling in the affected area.

Mucilages: The mucilage content in Silver Birch capsules has been shown to have a soothing effect on the urinary tract, helping to reduce irritation and inflammation, and facilitating the passage of stones through the urinary system.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the silver birch plant have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce pain and swelling associated with urinary calculus.
Barks: The barks of the silver birch plant contain betulinic acid, a compound that helps prevent kidney stones from forming.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh betula pendula leaves and stems according to season and quality standards.
Dry the plant material using shade drying method for 7-10 days or air circulation drying for 3-5 days.
Crush the dried betula pendula into fine powder using mortar and pestle or coffee grinder for 30 minutes.
Mix the powdered betula pendula with 10% hydroxypropyl methylcellulose as a capsule filler in a ratio of 1:2 and fill into vegetarian capsules.
Store the herbal capsules in airtight containers in a cool dry place for up to 6 months or freeze for longer periods.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Grape capsules helps with urinary calculus because they contain potent herbal extracts that have been traditionally used to alleviate kidney stones. The antioxidants and flavonoids present in these capsules help to reduce inflammation, ease pain and discomfort associated with stone formation, and improve urine flow to prevent future occurrences. Additionally, the diuretic properties of grape capsules increase water excretion, diluting the concentration of minerals that can contribute to stone formation, thereby promoting a healthy urinary tract.
remedy_properties: Diuretic property: Herbal grape capsules can increase urine production and flow, which helps to flush out small stones and prevent their formation by diluting the concentration of minerals in the urine.

Anti-inflammatory property: The anti-inflammatory compounds present in herbal grape capsules can reduce inflammation and swelling in the urinary tract, which can help alleviate symptoms such as pain and burning while urinating.

Antioxidant property: Herbal grape capsules are rich in antioxidants that can help protect the kidneys and other organs from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the risk of chronic kidney disease and stone formation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Grape roots have been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections and kidney stones due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
Barks: The barks of the grape plant contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary calculus.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of fresh vitis vinifera leaves and stems, washing them thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm air circulation oven at 40°c for 24 hours.
Grind 200g of dried vitis vinifera into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 part powdered vitis vinifera with 5 parts water to create a 20% herbal extract, stirring for 30 minutes.
Fill 1000 capsules with the prepared herbal extract, sealing and labeling them for future use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with urinary calculus because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort associated with kidney stones. The capsules also increase urine production, allowing for a faster removal of the stone fragments from the body. Additionally, stinging nettle's diuretic properties help to dissolve small stones and prevent new ones from forming by increasing the concentration of minerals in the urine that can help to bind to the stone and facilitate its passage out of the body.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Stinging nettle capsules increase urine production, helping to flush out small kidney stones and reduce symptoms associated with their passage.

Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects: Nettle's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the kidneys, which can contribute to the formation of kidney stones.

Antibacterial and antiviral properties: Stinging nettle capsules have been shown to exhibit antibacterial and antiviral activities, which may help prevent infections that can complicate kidney stone treatment and reduce the risk of recurrence.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the stinging nettle plant contain compounds that help to reduce inflammation and ease discomfort associated with urinary calculi, making them an effective ingredient in medicinal capsules.

Barks: The barks of the stinging nettle plant have been traditionally used to treat kidney stones and other urolithiasis-related issues due to their ability to reduce stone formation and alleviate symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh urtica dioica leaves and stems, ensuring proper identification and handling to avoid contamination.
Dry the harvested plant material using a dehydrator or air drying method for at least 48 hours to reduce moisture levels.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder, aiming for a uniform texture.
Mix 500mg of the powdered urtica dioica with 100mg of glycerin and 50mg of silicon dioxide, preparing capsules by filling softgel casings.
Store the prepared herbal capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenrod capsules helps with urinary calculus because of its unique ability to dissolve and break down kidney stones, also known as urinary calculi. The herbs in goldenrod have been shown to inhibit the growth and formation of new stones, while also helping to flush out existing ones from the urinary tract. Additionally, goldenrod's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce discomfort and pain associated with passing stones, making it a natural and effective solution for managing urinary calculus.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Goldenrod capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and irritation in the urinary tract, making it easier to pass stones or gravel.
Antimicrobial property: The antimicrobial properties of goldenrod help prevent bacterial infections from developing in the urinary tract, which can exacerbate conditions like urinary calculus.
Kidney-stone-dissolving property: Goldenrod's high concentration of flavonoids and terpenes helps break down calcium oxalate crystals that form into stones, making it easier to pass them naturally.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and polyphenols, roots have been traditionally used to treat kidney stones by reducing inflammation and alleviating pain.
Rhyzomes: Containing anti-inflammatory compounds like salicylic acid, rhyzomes help to reduce the risk of stone formation and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary calculus.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh solidago virgaurea leaves and flowers at dawn or early morning.
Dry the plant material in a warm, dark place for 7-10 days at 35°c to preserve its properties.
Grind 20 grams of dried solidago virgaurea into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 part ground solidago virgaurea with 2 parts gelatin and fill capsules #0 with the mixture for easy swallowing.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with urinary calculus because they have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that can help reduce pain and discomfort associated with kidney stones. The herb mucilages, found in marshmallow root, create a protective barrier in the urinary tract, which helps to reduce irritation and inflammation caused by stone fragments passing through the urinary tract. This natural remedy also helps to increase urine flow, which can aid in the passage of small stones or fragments, providing relief from symptoms.
remedy_properties: Emollient property: Marshmallow capsules have emollient properties, which helps to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the urinary tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with urinary calculi.
Antioxidant property: Marshmallow capsules contain antioxidants that help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the urinary tract, which can contribute to the formation of kidney stones.
Anti-inflammatory property: Marshmallow capsules have anti-inflammatory properties, which helps to reduce swelling and pain caused by urinary calculi, making it easier for the body to pass the stone.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain mucilages that help to soothe and protect the urinary tract, making them an effective treatment for urinary calculus.

Barks: The barks of the marshmallow plant are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with urinary calculi.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality marigold flowers althaea officinalis and clean them thoroughly.
Dry the flowers using air circulation method at room temperature for 24 hours.
Grind the dried flowers into fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered marigold with glycerin and water in a ratio of 1:2 to create a tincture that is left to steep for 14 days.
Strain the tincture and fill gelatin capsules with a dosage of 300mg per capsule using an encapsulating machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with urinary calculus because of its unique composition that aids in dissolving and eliminating kidney stones. The herb's diuretic properties increase urine production, which helps to flush out small stones and prevent new ones from forming. Additionally, dandelion's anti-inflammatory effects soothe the urinary tract, reducing pain and discomfort associated with kidney stone passage. By promoting healthy urine flow and reducing inflammation, dandelion capsules provide natural relief for individuals suffering from urinary calculus.
remedy_properties: Diuretic property: Dandelion capsules increase urine production, helping to flush out small kidney stones and reducing the risk of new stone formation.

Choleretic property: Dandelion's ability to stimulate bile production helps to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract and kidneys, which can contribute to the development of urinary calculi (kidney stones).

Antioxidant property: Dandelion's antioxidant compounds help protect the kidneys from damage caused by oxidative stress, which can exacerbate kidney stone formation and make it harder for the body to pass stones.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are a popular choice for treating urinary calculus due to their high concentration of taraxasterol, a compound that has been shown to inhibit the formation of kidney stones.
Buds: Dandelion buds contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation and pain associated with urinary tract infections and kidney stones.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh taraxacum officinale leaves and flowers in the morning, ensuring they are free of contaminants.
Dry the harvested plant material using shade drying or low-temperature oven for at least 8 hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using mortar and pestle, obtaining approximately 200 grams of dried taraxacum officinale.
Fill hard-shell capsules with 250 milligrams of the powdered taraxacum officinale per capsule, sealing them tightly to preserve potency.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years, checking on their potency and appearance regularly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Horse chestnut capsules helps with urinary calculus because they contain aescin, a natural compound that has been shown to help reduce inflammation and improve blood flow in the urinary tract. This can help to alleviate symptoms associated with kidney stones, such as pain and discomfort, by reducing swelling and pressure on the affected area. Additionally, horse chestnut's anti-inflammatory properties may also help to prevent stone formation by reducing the buildup of minerals in the kidneys.
remedy_properties: Aesculin: Aesculin, a saponin found in horse chestnut extract, has been shown to reduce the formation of kidney stones by inhibiting the crystallization of calcium oxalate and reducing the concentration of lithogenic factors in urine.

Vasodilation: Horse chestnut capsules may help alleviate urinary calculus symptoms such as pain and inflammation by relaxing blood vessels and improving circulation, which can reduce pressure on the kidneys and ureters.

Anti-inflammatory: The flavonoids present in horse chestnut extract have anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with urinary tract infections (UTIs) that contribute to kidney stone formation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the horse chestnut plant contain flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to help dissolve kidney stones and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary calculus.

Barks: The barks of the horse chestnut tree are rich in aescin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it effective for treating pain and inflammation associated with urinary tract infections and kidney stones.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of dried aesculus hippocastanum bark from a trusted supplier or local herbalist.
Grind the dried bark into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine the powdered bark with 100 grams of gelatin and mix well for 5 minutes to create the capsule filling.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with approximately 300 milligrams of the capsule filling mixture and seal tightly.
Store the finished herbal aesculus hippocastanum capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Buchu capsules increase urine production, which helps to flush out small stones or gravel from the urinary tract, preventing their growth and reducing symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Buchu's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce swelling and pain in the kidneys, ureters, and bladder, making it an effective natural treatment for kidney stone-related discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: Buchu capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the kidneys from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to the formation of urinary calculi.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that help to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, making them effective in relieving symptoms of urinary calculi.
Rhyzomes: Contains flavonoids and saponins that have been shown to inhibit the formation of kidney stones and reduce their size.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh agathosma betulina leaves and stems in the morning after dew has dried off.
Clean and wash the plant material under running water to remove dirt and debris.
Chop the plant material into small pieces and blend with 200ml of boiling water for 10 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool down to room temperature and then strain through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the strained liquid extract and store in an airtight container for up to 6 months.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Buchu capsules helps with urinary calculus because they contain Agathosma betulina, a natural herb that has been traditionally used to treat kidney stones. The antioxidants and flavonoids present in buchu help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the kidneys, which can contribute to the formation of stone-like deposits. Additionally, buchu's diuretic properties increase urine production, allowing for better stone passage and reduced risk of reformation. This natural remedy offers a safe and effective way to manage urinary calculus symptoms without the need for harsh medications.

Yellow gentian capsules helps with urinary calculus because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herb has been traditionally used to treat various kidney-related issues, including stones. Its ability to reduce inflammation and infection in the urinary tract allows for a smooth passage of small stones, preventing complications such as blockages or recurrent infections. Additionally, yellow gentian's diuretic properties help to increase urine output, which can also aid in passing calculi more easily.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Herbal Yellow Gentian capsules help reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can alleviate symptoms and prevent further damage caused by kidney stones.
Antioxidant property: The antioxidant compounds present in Yellow Gentian capsules help neutralize free radicals and oxidative stress that can contribute to kidney stone formation and growth.

Urinary antiseptic property: Yellow Gentian capsules have antibacterial properties that help eliminate bacterial infections in the urinary tract, which can reduce the risk of complications associated with kidney stones.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with urinary calculi.
Rhyzomes: Contain alkaloids that act as natural diuretics, increasing urine production to prevent stone formation.
remedy_recipe: Dry 250g of fresh gentiana lutea leaves in a low-temperature oven at 60°c for 2 hours.
Grind the dried gentiana lutea leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 100g of the powdered gentiana lutea with 200ml of boiling water to create an herbal infusion.
Steep the herbal infusion for 30 minutes before filtering it through cheesecloth or a coffee filter paper.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250mg of the filtered herbal extract and seal tightly.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat urinary calculus with herbal capsules is to combine them with a healthy lifestyle. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like Juniper Berry, Uva Ursi, and Buchu Leaf help to reduce inflammation and increase urine flow. Additionally, drinking plenty of water and reducing dietary salt intake can aid in passing the stone. Aloe Vera and Marshmallow Root also help soothe the urinary tract and alleviate discomfort.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to urinary calculus that are treated with herbal capsules are kidney stones, bladder stones, and gallstones. These herbs help dissolve and eliminate the stones by reducing inflammation and pain in the affected areas. For example, Chanca piedra (Kirkia nerifolia) is traditionally used to treat kidney stones, while Uva ursi (Arctostaphylos uva-ursi) is believed to help dissolve bladder stones.
